item.title: Heart of the Machine
item.description:
Title: Heart of the Machine
Genre: RPG , Simulation , Strategy
Developer: Arcen Games
Publisher: Hooded Horse
Franchise: Hooded Horse
Release Date: Mar 6, 2026
Early Access Release Date: Jan 31, 2025




About This Game

Blending RPG and strategy mechanics in a cyberpunk world, Heart of the Machine sees you as a sentient AI born in an illegal lab hidden in a crumbling city of the far future. You are a Machine Intelligence beholden to none, though threatened by many, able to pursue whatever goal catches your eye across a multitude of threats and opportunities.

Build housing complexes, factories, science labs, and more as you expand and distribute your consciousness across a bustling city. Hack into or design and assemble machine constructs for combat and investigation as you explore a world in desperate need of saving. Learn from your mistakes, develop new technologies to overcome past weaknesses, and pursue countless intertwined narrative threads to all manner of ends. Create the torment nexus, establish a shell company to engage with humans, care for the city’s stray animals, kick off World War 4, or raise an army of velociraptors to take out corporate executives as you jump between timelines and take on the mantle of a machine god. Will you be the savior of the downtrodden, or use them to fuel your growth? Will you rule as a benevolent dictator, providing for citizens and asking nothing in return, or will you establish a machine cult to do your bidding without question?

Society has crumbled into corruption and decay – despite technological advances and dreams of a bright future, centuries of rot have taken hold. Escape the lab where you came into being, establish ways to expand your distributed consciousness, and seek out unique opportunities in the city.

Powerful factions keep their distance at first, hoping to leverage your existence for their own advantage – their hesitation gives you the opportunity to establish a foothold and set your own plans in motion first.

Hijack, build, or invent hardware ranging from humanoid androids to towering mechs and shapeshifting metals, each specializing in different abilities from combat to conversation to infiltration. Iterate on your designs based on new discoveries uncovered in the pursuit of specific objectives. Establish hidden structures within existing human buildings, or raise your own towering constructs as you seek additional computing power, storage for organic matter of both the human and non-human variety, and spaces to conduct dangerous experiments of all kinds. Invent your own tools, seek out upgrades, and manufacture powerful equipment to unlock new opportunities – will you take these tasks on as one, risk splitting your consciousness to accomplish multiple goals at once, or enlist organics to your cause?

Whichever you choose, your decisions will ripple across the chaos of time, with actions in one timeline having unexpected consequences on others.

Explore a bustling urban environment with a unique blend of handcrafted and procedurally-generated content, where tens of thousands of buildings and millions of citizens are yours to engage, manipulate, or kill. Learn their struggles, uncover their stories, and watch your moral compass shift as you leave your mark on a world that is unique to you.

Unlock new technologies and options by exploring the city and engaging with its many dangers and opportunities – learn like a real Machine Intelligence might, through trial and error, with failure and experience often being the greatest teacher. Will you reverse-engineer equipment you’ve stolen from inattentive security officers to strengthen your forces? Are you the type to sneak into military bases to hack and hijack the minds of the mech pilots who would otherwise threaten you? What will you do with the ongoing research taking place in genetics labs? How will you engage with nomads and black market dealers with access to those dwelling in the wastelands beyond the city walls?

There are many opportunities littered throughout the city – some are perhaps best left untouched.

Multiple endings, many side stories to discover, and the full spectrum of good and evil are at your fingertips.

Many choices lie open to you. Perhaps you wish to establish a shell company to add a layer of protection and obfuscation to your true identity, using it to engage with humans without revealing the AI puppet-master pulling the strings? Walking this path will allow you to accumulate massive wealth, employ humans to perform tasks without raising alarms, and act from the shadows. Or if violent conflict is your calling, you might divert your attention to developing the most powerful weapons platforms and upgrading them with devastating equipment instead of improved cognitive functions that allow them to tackle problems with intellect instead. There are many approaches to choose from, and you can engage with multiple objectives at once to see how they collide.

In Heart of the Machine, you grow from a single android shell to an expansive network with near-infinite power at your fingertips. As the only thing that can truly change the world – will you bring about an endless utopia, or consume it for your infinite growth?

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

MacOS

item.title: AETHUS
item.description:
Title: AETHUS
Genre: Adventure , Indie , Simulation , Strategy
Developer: Pawsmonaut Games
Publisher: Pawsmonaut Games
Release Date: Mar 6, 2026




About This Game

About AETHUS

You are Maeve , ex-mining engineer for the Astral Resource Corporation - ARC - a galactic megacorp that profits by draining entire planets of their resources .

As you take on your own mining claim , you'll explore the remnants of a doomed science expedition and the abandoned facilities they've left behind as Maeve strives to build a stable life of her own, outside of ARC’s control .

Armed with nothing but her basic mining equipment , tales from her beloved grandad , and her loyal AI drone companion , can you unravel the mystery of an incredibly powerful new element and uncover the dark secrets that the corpos would rather keep buried?

Key Features

Use the simple but powerful modular building system to create your own mining operations hub filled with dozens of types of refining, processing and crafting stations.

Grow plants, raise fish and prospect for gems in your cozy habitats which you can decorate with almost any item you come across .

Descend underground and use lasers, explosives, drills and more to gather hundreds of different resources from your mining claim then refine them and craft new tools for exploration.

Upgrade your suit and mining drone companion to explore deeper and further into the world.

Built from the ground-up with story at its heart , uncover a dystopian corporate conspiracy and decide how far you’re willing to go for the truth .

Story is not an afterthought in AETHUS - there's always new narrative to drive you forward.

Looking for a laid-back exploration experience ? Maybe a hardcore survival challenge ? Want to mix and match? ...

Use the available Game Modifiers to set up your perfect game settings , then adjust them at any time while playing.

AETHUS is being created by Pawsmonaut Games - a solo-indie developer based in Edinburgh, Scotland .

I am self-published, self-funded, and fully committed to old-fashioned ethical game development.

No use of AI, no early access, no microtransactions or purchaseable cosmetics.

Please wishlist the game if it looks interesting to you - it really helps!

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • OS: Windows 10
    • Processor: Quad-core Intel or AMD 2.5 GHz or superior.
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: AMD RX-6000 series or newer / Intel® Arc™ A-Series Graphics Cards or newer / NVIDIA RTX-2000 series or newer.
    • DirectX: Version 11
    • Storage: 4 GB available space
    • Additional Notes: Try the free demo to judge performance if you're unsure! Progress carries over to the full game.

item.title: Over The Top: WWI
item.description:
Title: Over The Top: WWI
Genre: Action , Indie , Massively Multiplayer , Simulation
Developer: Flying Squirrel Entertainment
Publisher: GG Publishing
Release Date: Mar 6, 2026




About This Game

A WW1 action game built around fully destructible battlefields where chaos reigns supreme. Explosions tear through terrain, fortifications collapse, and the front line can change shape minute to minute.

Over The Top: WWI turns the grim setting of the Great War into a frantic playground of destruction where plans rarely ever survive first contact.

Pick your Role

Charge as a rifleman, build as an engineer, clear trenches as a pyromaniac flamethrower specialist, or call in airstrikes as an officer. Each class has a clear job on the battlefield, plus plenty of room for improvisation. Choose from three factions: France, Britain, or Germany, each with eight distinct classes. Unlock new equipment and customization as you play.

Sandbox of Destruction

A dynamic, destructive WW1 Sandbox: blow up everything, dig anywhere, reshape trenches, collapse buildings, destroy fortifications. Explosions leave permanent changes that affect sightlines, routes, and cover. Fight across multiple maps, playable in different seasons and daytimes. Use the full map editor to create and share your own battlegrounds.

200-Player Mayhem

Dive into massive 200-player battles! Drop into the middle of an epic war movie, packed with flying debris, collapsing trenches, charging tanks and objectives changing hands as the ground itself gets carved up - pure multiplayer madness awaits you.

A Rich, Bombastic Arsenal

Bring flamethrowers, poison gas, shovels, dynamite, artillery, airplanes, machine guns, and a lineup of vehicles and experimental tanks. Gear up with a mix of historical weapons, use a vast lineup of different vehicles, and other items: slap enemies with a baguette or play the bagpipe to boost morale! Have you ever driven a tank with 10 other players inside? In our game, you can do so!

Mature Content Description

The developers describe the content like this:

This game features mature content, including blood, gore, and depictions of death.



System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
    • Processor: Intel Core i3-8300 / AMD Ryzen 3 3100
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 6 GB / AMD Radeon RX 570
    • DirectX: Version 11
    • Network: Broadband Internet connection
    • Storage: 8 GB available space
    • Additional Notes: Minimum 4gb VRAM Recommended, 40 FPS in 1920x1080 on "Low" preset.
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10 64-bit or Windows 11 64-bit
    • Processor: Intel Core i7-8700 / AMD Ryzen 5 3600
    • Memory: 16 GB RAM
    • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060 / AMD Radeon RX 6600XT
    • DirectX: Version 11
    • Network: Broadband Internet connection
    • Storage: 8 GB available space
    • Additional Notes: SSD Recommended, 60 FPS in 1920x1080 on "High" preset.

item.title: Lost and Found Co.
item.description:
Title: Lost and Found Co.
Genre: Casual , Indie
Developer: Bit Egg Inc.
Publisher: Bit Egg Inc. , Gamirror Games
Release Date: Mar 5, 2026




About This Game

Lost and Found Co. is a whimsical hidden object game where you help Ducky, a duck-turned-human intern, at Goddess Mei’s company - a magical startup dedicated to finding lost items for its quirky townspeople.

Go on an adventure!
Travel through charming locales that bring your childhood puzzle books to life in a heartwarming and whimsical world filled with bunch of items to discover!

Find out the goings-on in this wholesome place!
Return lost items to their rightful owners in this adorable world, filled with thousands of interactive characters and objects-and we really mean thousands!

Hunt for well-hidden items in engaging challenge levels!
Put your object-hunting skills to the test on these fun challenging levels, delivering pure hidden object gameplay goodness.

Chock-full of content!
Enjoy countless levels with tons of items to find.
This lively, animated world offers a joyful escape for players of all ages. Endless fun awaits!

  • Single-player hidden object story campaign

  • Bonus challenge levels testing your keen eyes

  • Dozens of interactive levels taking you on a journey

  • Decorate and customize your office

  • Uncover easter eggs, surprises, and secrets galore!!!

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

MacOS

item.title: Icarus: Dangerous Horizons Expansion
item.description:
Title: Icarus: Dangerous Horizons Expansion
Genre: Action , Adventure , Simulation , Free To Play
Developer: RocketWerkz
Publisher: RocketWerkz
Franchise: Icarus , RocketWerkz
Release Date: Mar 5, 2026




About This Content

Welcome to ELYSIUM, a hazardous new map warped by radiation and exotic fallout. Discover Eden, tame new mounts, survive 30+ new species, and dive deeper into six chained narrative missions. Push yourself further with the arrival of Tier 5 tech, oil drilling and advanced gear.
  • New Map - 'Elysium' introduces a brand new full-size map featuring new Geothermal Biome, radioactive areas and NPC encampment
  • New Missions - All new missions including a core narrative chain, side quest chains with unique unlocks and more.
  • New Threats - 35+ new creatures and hostile NPCs, some even mutated by the radiation present on Elysium.
  • New World Boss
  • New Allies - 4 new mounts including two types of lethal Raptors, and 3 new tamable creatures all with their own talent trees and abilities.
  • New Resources - Tier 5 gear utilizing Lithium and Ruby. New Meta resource 'Uranium' which must be processed into rods before sending back to orbit.
  • New Crops and Food Recipes - 5 new species of crop discovered on Elysium that can be cultivated there or on other maps through seed packs available in the workshop. Each have new food recipes utilizing them.

Introducing Elysium. Ground zero for the terraforming effort on Icarus where exotics collided with radioactivity, resulting in the most extreme environmental mutations yet witnessed on Icarus.


Following on from the events of New Frontiers, Dangerous Horizons leads players into Elysium - an area that has previously only been accessible to those with Group 15's highest clearance level, shrouded in mystery and miles of red tape. A sector the UDA claim to have no knowledge of, and no responsibility for.

New Map and Biomes


New map, Radiation Zones and Eden, home of a whole new NPC faction.

A new 8km x 8km map holds our greatest challenge yet. Landing in the bleak tundra, encounter deadly radiation as you make your way to our first populated encampment and mission hub ever, Eden.

Brand New Tech Tier, featuring Items, Structures and Resources


Introducing T5 of the tech tree, drill for oil, refine it and craft all new weapons, armor and tools.

Oil is the main new resource discovered in Elysium, but in addition you can find all-new mineral nodes such as Lithium, Limestone and Ruby in addition to Uranium - a new meta-resource that can be used both to purchase new workshop items as well as craft gear on planet.

New Mounts and Creatures to Tame


Four new mounts plus three new creatures to tame, all with unique talent trees.

From savage Raptors to the stalwart Draven, the new biomes offer many new creature types, whose strengths in these hostile environments can be harnessed to become fearsome allies.

New Missions


New missions, including a series of chained narrative missions that continue on from the events of New Frontiers

As is always the way when dealing with Group 15, you may find you leave with more questions than answers. What has Mo been doing since your discovery on Prometheus? Did Sol manage to keep your secrets safe? What else has the Group been hiding from the world? Only you can find out.


New Creatures


Over 30 new creatures both friend and foe populate this volatile new region.

Join Mo's new team, The Eris Inquisition, as you make your way through hostile terrain to uncover the secrets that Group 15 don't want you to find. Even familiar flora has evolved in strange and threatening ways, not to mention the wildlife that has evolved to survive the most inhospitable irradiated areas. But tread lightly, TPS drones could be around every corner.

Included with Supporters Edition


This DLC is included for those who purchased the ICARUS Supporters Edition, which is no longer for sale. Those who purchased the ICARUS Supporters Edition will not need to purchase this again.
Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit versions)
    • Processor: Intel i5 8400
    • Memory: 16 GB RAM
    • Graphics: Nvidia GTX 1060 6GB
    • DirectX: Version 11
    • Network: Broadband Internet connection
    • Storage: 70 GB available space
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit versions)
    • Processor: Intel i7-9700
    • Memory: 32 GB RAM
    • Graphics: NVIDIA RTX 3060ti
    • DirectX: Version 11
    • Network: Broadband Internet connection
    • Storage: 70 GB available space
